description_long: This object is a collection of various road traffic signs, each mounted on a vertical metal post. The signs include circular, octagonal, and triangular shapes, with a range of colors such as blue, red, and white, and feature both pictograms and text, some of which are in Korean. The signs display common road instructions such as speed limits, directional arrows, prohibitions, and warnings. The posts are slender and metallic, supporting the signs at a height suitable for visibility to drivers and pedestrians. The group is arranged in rows, suggesting a set of standardized signs for urban or suburban roadways. The signs are designed to be highly visible and durable, with reflective surfaces for nighttime visibility.
description: A grouped set of post-mounted road traffic signs with various shapes, colors, and symbols, including both pictograms and Korean text. The signs are arranged in rows and are designed for clear visibility in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faces of all traffic signs, revealing their shapes, colors, and symbols, including text and pictograms.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profiles of the signs and posts, with minimal visibility of the sign faces.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the signs and the arrangement of the posts, with no visible symbols or text.
description_view_3: Angled side view highlighting the depth and spacing between the rows of signs, with partial visibility of the sign faces.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: Directional arrows, pedestrian, no entry, speed limit, warning triangles, parking prohibition, and other standard road symbols
attribute_location_context: urban roadside, intersections, parking lot entrances
